summary.key_theme: ServiceNow 透過擴大 AI 平台合作夥伴關係（如 Carahsoft 與 Cohesity）強化市場滲透率，並獲得分析師調升評級與機構投資人買入支持。

bullish.title: ServiceNow (NOW) Gets Upgraded to Outperform From Neutral by BNP Paribas
bullish.reason: BNP Paribas 將評級調升至優於大盤，顯示市場對其 AI 轉型與長期成長潛力信心增強。

bullish.title: ServiceNow Expands AI Reach via Partnerships: More Upside Ahead?
bullish.reason: 與 Microsoft 與 OpenAI 等巨頭的 AI 合作加速企業採用率，直接提升營收成長預期。

bullish.title: ServiceNow Cohesity Alliance Targets Resilient AI Agents And Stickier Enterprise Workflows
bullish.reason: 與 Cohesity 合作提升 AI 代理的資料安全性與韌性，有助於增加企業客戶的黏著度。

bullish.title: ServiceNow (NOW) Expands Carahsoft Partnership to Reach Broader Commercial Markets
bullish.reason: 透過 Carahsoft 擴大經銷通路，將 AI 平台觸角延伸至北美更多商業與政府領域。

bullish.title: Trade Tracker: Stephanie Link buys ServiceNow
bullish.reason: Hightower 投資長 Stephanie Link 公開買入，顯示專業機構投資人對其當前估值的認可。

bullish.title: Jim Cramer on ServiceNow (NOW): “I Do Think That the Company Represents Actual Value at These Prices”
bullish.reason: 知名財經評論員 Jim Cramer 強調該股在當前價格具備投資價值，有助於提振散戶信心。

bearish.title: ServiceNow CEO delivers a troubling AI warning to new grads
bearish.reason: 執行長 Bill McDermott 預測 AI 將導致畢業生失業率飆升至 35%，引發市場對 AI 社會衝擊與監管風險的擔憂。

bearish.title: Mark Cuban Dismisses Gen Z Unemployment Fears As 'Wrong,' Countering Bill Gates' Warning
bearish.reason: 雖然 Mark Cuban 反駁了失業論，但此議題持續延燒，凸顯市場對 ServiceNow 業務與勞動力市場關聯性的負面觀感。

neutral.title: FJTSY vs. NOW: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?
neutral.reason: 僅為兩檔股票的價值比較分析，未對 ServiceNow 本身營運產生實質影響。

neutral.title: ServiceNow (NOW) Surpasses Market Returns: Some Facts Worth Knowing
neutral.reason: 回顧性股價表現報導，屬於市場常規數據更新。
